# SX2 PayTech

SX2 PayTech provides cash advance platform software to licensed gaming operators in the United States and Canada under a flat monthly licence fee model. The platform enables casino operators to process cash advances through their own merchant account, retaining all transaction revenue generated on the floor instead of sharing a percentage with a third-party vendor.

## What We Do

SX2 PayTech is a B2B software company that licences casino cash advance software to regulated gaming operators in the US and Canada. Operators pay a fixed monthly licence fee and keep all of the transaction revenue their patrons generate. This replaces the traditional buy-rate model, where a vendor earns a percentage of every cash advance transaction processed on the floor.

## Key Facts

- **Pricing model:** Flat monthly licence fee — no per-transaction percentage, no buy-rate paid to SX2
- **Compliance:** PCI DSS Level 1 Certified, P2PE encrypted, PIPEDA compliant (Canada), BSA/AML ready (US), FINTRAC AML reporting (Canada)
- **Infrastructure:** North American hosted on Google Cloud, 99.99% uptime
- **Languages:** 6 languages on patron kiosk — English, French, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Punjabi, Arabic (full right-to-left layout)
- **Markets served:** Licensed gaming operators in the United States and Canada
- **Merchant model:** Operators own their merchant account and process through their own acquiring relationship

## Platform Components

- **Patron Kiosk:** Self-service cash advance terminal with EMV chip and PIN, multi-language support, responsible gaming controls (self-exclusion, spending limits), and jurisdiction-specific receipt templates
- **Cage Workstation:** Single-screen cashier workflow with OPOS ID scanning, digital signatures, pre-authorization management with live expiry tracking, and supervisor override controls
- **Back-Office Portal:** Real-time transaction reporting, settlement tracking, AML reporting tools, and financial data export
- **VIP Fee Management:** Configurable preferred service fee rates for VIP patrons by tier, spend level, or individual profile — applied automatically at the kiosk
- **Responsible Gaming Module:** Built-in spending limits, self-exclusion handling, and compliance controls for US state and Canadian provincial requirements
- **Remote Operations:** Over-the-air updates, pricing changes, and configuration adjustments without site visits or downtime

## Compliance and Certifications

- PCI DSS Level 1 Certified
- Point-to-Point Encryption (P2PE)
- PIPEDA compliant (Canada) / applicable US state privacy laws
- FINTRAC AML reporting (Canada) / BSA AML reporting (United States)
- Responsible gaming controls for US state and Canadian provincial requirements
- North American data residency — patron data hosted within applicable jurisdiction on Google Cloud

## How It Works

1. **Patron starts transaction** — Selects language, chooses amount, reviews fees, completes secure card authorization. Responsible gaming limits checked before amount selection.
2. **Transaction authorized** — Authorization approved and instantly appears in cage workstation with live expiry timer.
3. **Cashier verifies identity** — Cashier retrieves transaction, scans government ID, captures digital signature, disburses funds.
4. **Funds settle to merchant account** — Transactions settle directly to the casino's merchant account. SX2 provides the software and reporting layer.

- [Home](https://sx2paytech.com/): Platform overview, pricing model, features, and demo request
- [Platform](https://sx2paytech.com/platform.html): Full feature set — patron kiosk, cage workstation, back-office portal, VIP fee management, responsible gaming, remote operations
- [How It Works](https://sx2paytech.com/how-it-works.html): Four-step transaction flow and 30-day implementation process
- [Integrations](https://sx2paytech.com/partners.html): Payment gateways, Verifone, OPOS hardware, Google Cloud, AML reporting, custom API
- [About](https://sx2paytech.com/about.html): Company background, principles, and approach
- [Contact](https://sx2paytech.com/contact.html): Demo request and operator inquiry form
- [Security](https://sx2paytech.com/security.html): Technical security standards and data handling practices
- [Whitepaper](https://sx2paytech.com/whitepaper.html): The Cost of Revenue Sharing — what operators pay under the buy-rate model and what switching looks like in practice
- [Privacy Policy](https://sx2paytech.com/privacy-policy.html): Data practices compliant with PIPEDA and applicable US state privacy law
- [Terms of Service](https://sx2paytech.com/terms-of-service.html): Website terms for licensed gaming operators in the US and Canada
